text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables
31
sa_type: MA & PDP Survey Type (1-4)
SAS Format: STP
1: MA ONLY
2: MA PDP
3: PDP
5: FFS
sp_getappt: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often get appointment with specialist as soon as needed
SAS Format: OFA
1: NEVER
2: SOMETIMES
3: USUALLY
4: ALWAYS
sp_mdinformd: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often personal MD up-to-date on care from specialists
SAS Format: OFA
1: NEVER
2: SOMETIMES
3: USUALLY
4: ALWAYS
sp_persmd: RECODE : Personal MD is a specialist
SAS Format: YNA
1: YES
2:
